title: cleome breviflora
intro: Cleome breviflora, also known as the short-flowered spiderflower or narrow-flowered spiderflower, is a flowering plant species in the Cleomaceae family, native to parts of Asia. Traditionally, Cleome breviflora has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, soothing respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of certain skin conditions. Cleome breviflora can be prepared as an herbal remedy through infusion, decoction, or tincture, although its preparation and usage should be consulted with a medical professional or an experienced herbalist.
